memo: Review supports the draft approval. File is complete with all three required inpatient admission documents. The clinical summary clearly documents the admitting clinician's expectation of hospital care spanning at least two midnights, supported by severity (community-acquired pneumonia, SpO2 88%, CURB-65 3, comorbidities including atrial fibrillation on anticoagulation) and complex medical factors (IV antibiotic therapy, oxygen support, monitoring, fall risk). The decision correctly applies the Medicare two-midnight benchmark per MCR-INPT and COV-2MN. Expedited timeframe is on track with 21 hours remaining. Approve and release.
member_impact: Your request for inpatient admission has been approved. You may be admitted to the hospital for treatment of your pneumonia and other medical needs. Your insurance will cover inpatient hospital care. You should not have to pay a hospital deductible or copay for this admission.
recommended_actions: Release approval without delay to meet expedited timeline
Ensure authorization is transmitted to hospital before admission

citations.quote: Inpatient admission is appropriate when the admitting clinician reasonably expects the member to require medically necessary hospital care spanning at least two midnights, considering the member's history, comorbidities, severity of presentation, and risk of an adverse event.
An inpatient admission is generally appropriate when the admitting clinician expects the member to require hospital care that crosses two midnights

An inpatient admission review requires the emergency department or clinic note from presentation, the physician admission order with the admitting clinician's expectation of the length and intensity of care, and the clinical progress notes available at the time of review.
A Medicare Advantage plan must follow traditional Medicare coverage criteria: national coverage determinations, applicable local coverage determinations, and Medicare statutes and regulations.
Expedited decisions must be sent within 72 hours of receipt.

findings.detail: File is complete: all 3 required documents for inpatient_admission are present.
Decision clock: 21 hours remain on the expedited track (due 2026-07-11T18:00:00Z). Prioritize this file.

tool_input.query: inpatient admission two-midnight expectation Medicare criteria

query 'expedited decision timeframe hours' → REG-EXP-72 (11.836), REG-EXT (5.005), REG-UNTIMELY (4.058), REG-STD-7 (3.553)
query 'community-acquired pneumonia inpatient coverage' → MCR-PWC (3.31), COV-2MN (2.932), MCR-INPT (2.918), DOC-INPT (2.707)
